scope_note: The accessible Common App school profile does not publish a GPA threshold for Columbia. This panel therefore summarizes the holistic-review language it does expose and explicitly notes the source limitation.
policy_summary: The accessible Common App school profile does not publish a minimum GPA for Columbia. It instead describes a holistic admissions process in which every part of the application matters.

what_mit_does_say.claim: The accessible Common App school profile does not show a minimum GPA cutoff for Columbia.
The profile describes Columbia’s admissions process as holistic rather than formulaic.
